content.text:
The test passed immediately. The implementation already correctly handles the case of cursed sword with enchantment 5: the `surchargeRate` function adds both 0.5 (cursed) + 0.3 (high enchantment) = 0.8, so 100 + 100*0.8 = 180 + 10 (first insurance) + 5 (fee) = 195G.

Since the test passes, there is no compilation error and no runtime error. The existing implementation already handles this case correctly because the surcharge composition logic was generalized in earlier refactoring.

Proceeding to Green phase.

Note: This test passing immediately is a valid TDD outcome when prior refactoring has produced a sufficiently general implementation. The Green phase will have nothing to implement, and Refactor can proceed (or be a no-op if no improvements are warranted).
